highlights.description: Visual multi-agent workflow designer with React Flow canvas for exploring agent team specifications
Gmail-style floating panels for viewing agent details with drag, resize, and minimize
Persistent views to save and restore UI layouts using Ent ORM with SQLite/PostgreSQL

added.description: React Flow canvas for visualizing agent workflows with custom nodes and edges
Gmail-style floating panels for agent details with drag, resize, minimize, and close controls
Multiple floating panels support with staggered positioning (like Gmail compose windows)
Panel header colors match agent model type (opus=red, sonnet=blue, haiku=green)
2x2 grid layout for viewing up to 4 agent teams simultaneously
Views dropdown to save, load, update, and delete UI layouts
Markdown rendering with syntax highlighting for agent instructions
Team selector sidebar with checkboxes for multi-team selection
Go HTTP server with agent team API endpoints
File watcher for hot-reloading spec changes without server restart
Ent ORM schema for Views entity with SQLite and PostgreSQL support
Views REST API for CRUD operations on saved layouts
CLI entry point with workspace and port flags
Embedded frontend assets in Go binary

documentation.description: Initial README with installation and usage instructions
